overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person action game (Mafia II) set in a snowy 1940s urban environment at night. The player character walks through snow-covered streets, passes under a large billboard structure, observes the surroundings at an intersection, and continues walking past vintage cars and pedestrians with umbrellas.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the snow-covered road toward a large metal billboard tower

multi-story brick industrial buildings with illuminated windows and smoke stacks
ornate metal lamp posts casting warm orange light on the snow
asphalt road covered with snow showing tire tracks and footprints

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the center of a snow-covered urban street at night, approaching a large metal billboard tower. Street lights cast warm glows on the snow while vintage cars pass in the distance and brick apartment buildings line the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection area under the billboard tower with parked cars

vintage cars drive past on the right side of the road

vintage black car driving past the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the metal billboard tower and emerges at an intersection. A wooden house and parked vintage cars appear on the right while pedestrians walk nearby. The character continues walking as cars pass by on the snowy road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with 360-degree view of surrounding buildings

events.description: character stops walking and stands still at the intersection
camera pans around the character to survey the surroundings

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection looking around at the snowy urban environment and passing traffic

entered.detail: industrial smoke stacks emitting white smoke against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the intersection and rotates to observe the surroundings. The camera pans to show the billboard tower now behind, industrial smoke stacks in the distance, and the snowy streetscape with passing cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with parked cars and pedestrians

events.description: character resumes walking along the street edge
police car parked on the right side with headlights on

agents.ego_description: walking along the snowy street passing parked cars and pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: vintage police car parked at the curb with headlights illuminated
person holding a white umbrella walking toward the character

entered.detail: large rectangular road sign seen from the back side mounted on metal poles

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the street passing rows of parked vintage cars and brick apartment buildings. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the snowy sidewalk, and a police car is parked on the right. The character continues down the road as snow falls gently.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy urban street at night that transitions from a focused approach toward a landmark into a wide observation of a bustling city intersection. It begins with the character walking down the center of a snow-covered road, moving toward a large metal billboard tower under the warm glow of street lights. As the character passes beneath the tower, the scene opens into a wider intersection where wooden houses, parked vintage cars, and pedestrians emerge from the periphery. The camera then pauses and rotates to survey the surroundings, shifting the perspective to reveal industrial smoke stacks in the distance and the billboard tower now positioned behind. Finally, the movement resumes as the character walks past rows of brick apartment buildings and pedestrians with umbrellas, continuing down the snowy road past a parked police car while snow falls gently.
